steps.title: Identify the key signal in the researchers' argument
steps.content: The strongest signal is the researchers' statement: “Earth's climate is changing in ways that challenge such classifications.” This directly indicates that the invasive classification may not hold as climate changes.

steps.title: Apply this to the answer choices
steps.content:
C captures the logical consequence: if climate will change environmental conditions, then the invasive label reflects conditions that may not persist.
The other choices either address past conditions (A), assume climate won't matter (B), or propose selective classification without evidence (D).
That matches choice C — C is correct.
